Name: Windows Scheduled Task - Create
Description: Create Windows scheduled task. If the task exists it will be torn down and re-added to ensure consistency

Parameters.Name: TaskName
Parameters.Label: Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the Scheduled Task

Parameters.Name: RunAsUser
Parameters.Label: User
Parameters.HelpText: The User that the task will run as

Parameters.Name: RunAsPassword
Parameters.Label: Password
Parameters.HelpText: Specifying a password allows the task to run when the user is not logged on to the server.

Parameters.Name: Command
Parameters.Label: Action
Parameters.HelpText: The Action that the task executes. Usually a path to the executable

Parameters.Name: Arguments
Parameters.Label: Arguments
Parameters.HelpText: A value that specifies any arguments to be passed to run the task.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
MINUTE|Every Minute
HOURLY|Hourly
DAILY|Daily
WEEKLY|Weekly
WEEKDAYS|Weekdays
ONCE|One off
ONSTART|On Start
ONLOGON|On Logon
ONIDLE|On Idle
MONTHLY|Monthly

Parameters.Name: StartTime
Parameters.Label: Start Time
Parameters.HelpText: The Time the task will run. Use the format HH:mm:ss

Parameters.Name: StartDate
Parameters.Label: Start Date
Parameters.HelpText: The date the task will start running. use the format MM/dd/yyyy

Parameters.Name: Modifier
Parameters.Label: Modifier
Parameters.HelpText: A value that specifies how often the task runs within its schedule type. For ONCE, ONSTART, ONLOGON and ONIDLE any value can be used since it will be ignored (They do not use modifiers with MO).

Parameters.Name: Interval
Parameters.Label: Interval
Parameters.HelpText: A value that specifies the repetition interval in minutes.

Parameters.Name: Duration
Parameters.Label: Duration
Parameters.HelpText: A value that specifies the duration to run the task. The time format is HH:mm (24-hour time).

Parameters.Name: Days
Parameters.Label: Days
Parameters.HelpText: A value that specifies the day of the week to run the task. Valid values are: MON, TUE, WED, THU, FRI, SAT, SUN and for MONTHLY schedules 1 - 31 (days of the month). The wildcard character (*) specifies all days.

Parameters.Name: TaskStatus
Parameters.Label: TaskStatus
Parameters.HelpText: Whether the task is enabled, disabled, or left as-is when this step completes
